title: Cream Cheese Garlic Bread Korean

seo.title: How to Make Cream Cheese Garlic Bread Korean — Easy Korean Recipe
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make authentic Cream Cheese Garlic Bread Korean. This easy Korean recipe includes step-by-step instructions, tips, and serving ideas.

seo.imageAlt: Authentic Korean Cream Cheese Garlic Bread Korean recipe
seo.imageCaption: Delicious homemade Cream Cheese Garlic Bread Korean — a beloved Korean classic

description: Indulge in the irresistible fusion of savory garlic bread and sweet cream cheese with this popular Korean street food. Each soft bun is generously slathered with a rich garlic butter mixture and filled with a creamy, slightly sweet cheese center. This delightful treat offers a perfect balance of flavors and textures, making it a beloved snack or dessert.

ingredients.notes: cut into 6-8 wedges, not all the way through

instructions.title: Prepare the Cream Cheese Filling
instructions.text: In a medium bowl, combine the softened cream cheese, 2 tablespoons of granulated sugar, and 2 tablespoons of heavy cream. Mix until smooth and creamy. Transfer the filling into a piping bag or a small ziploc bag with a corner snipped off.

instructions.title: Prepare the Garlic Butter Glaze
instructions.text: In another bowl, whisk together the melted unsalted butter, minced garlic, chopped fresh parsley, 1 tablespoon of granulated sugar, the beaten egg, and milk. Mix until all ingredients are well combined and the glaze is homogeneous.

instructions.title: Cut and Fill the Bread
instructions.text: Take each dinner roll or brioche bun and slice it into 6-8 equal wedges, making sure not to cut all the way through the bottom. The slices should remain connected at the base. Gently open the wedges and pipe the cream cheese filling into each cut, ensuring an even distribution.

instructions.title: Glaze the Bread
instructions.text: Carefully dunk each filled bread into the garlic butter glaze, ensuring all sides and crevices are thoroughly coated. You can also use a brush to generously apply the glaze, making sure the cream cheese filling is also touched by the glaze.

instructions.title: Bake the Garlic Bread
instructions.text: Preheat your oven to 180C (350F). Place the glazed bread on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until the bread is golden brown and the cream cheese filling is slightly melted and bubbly.

instructions.title: Garnish and Serve
instructions.text_: Once baked, remove the Cream Cheese Garlic Bread from the oven. For an extra touch, you may sprinkle a little more fresh chopped parsley on top. Serve immediately while warm, allowing everyone to enjoy the gooey, aromatic goodness.

tips: For the best flavor, always use freshly minced garlic rather than pre-minced garlic from a jar.
Ensure your cream cheese is at room temperature before mixing to achieve a perfectly smooth and pipeable filling.
Serve the Cream Cheese Garlic Bread warm straight from the oven to enjoy the melted cream cheese and fragrant garlic butter at their best.
article: Cream Cheese Garlic Bread Korean is a beloved Korean Baking dish enjoyed across Korean. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
